name: Front view, Game Boy pixel

promptTemplate: Front-facing character sprite, {{subject}}, {{width}}x{{height}} pixels, Game Boy style 4-shade pixel art, square pixels, no anti-aliasing, transparent background, centered on canvas

name: Back view, Game Boy pixel
promptTemplate: Back view character sprite, {{subject}}, {{width}}x{{height}} pixels, Game Boy style 4-shade pixel art, square pixels, no anti-aliasing, transparent background, centered on canvas

promptTemplate: Front-facing character, {{subject}}, cute modern art in Studio Ghibli style: soft watercolor feel, expressive eyes, gentle lighting, hand-drawn quality, whimsical. Single character illustration, transparent background, high quality.
